input.product: AI meeting notes tool that generates action items and follow-ups

category.name: AI Meeting Intelligence
category.rationale: Positions beyond transcription (commodity) into intelligence (premium). Customers understand 'meeting tool' but 'intelligence' signals higher value than 'notes'.

target_customer.pain: Losing decisions and action items across 10+ meetings/week
target_customer.trigger: Missed a commitment made in a meeting, causing project delay
target_customer.disqualified: Solo founders (too few meetings), enterprise (need on-prem)

competitive_alternatives.weakness: Transcribes everything but doesn't extract decisions or track follow-ups
Good recording but action items require manual review
Inconsistent, depends on who takes notes, often lost
Decisions get lost, same discussions repeated, accountability unclear

unique_attributes.attribute: Automatic action item extraction with assignee detection
Follow-up tracking across meetings (detects unresolved items)
unique_attributes.defensibility: Requires meeting graph, not just transcription

unique_attributes.attribute: Integration with Jira/Linear to create tickets from decisions

output.positioning_statement: For engineering managers at remote-first companies, MeetingMind is the AI meeting intelligence tool that turns every meeting into tracked action items, unlike Otter and Fireflies which only transcribe, because it understands engineering workflows and automatically creates tickets from decisions.
